title: Follow-up action types: FollowUpAction, ExpiryCondition, BeforeContentSource
purpose: Define the foundational types for the follow-up system in norn::tool::follow_up. These types are the vocabulary that every subsequent brief in both the follow-up and action-log clusters depends on. FollowUpAction describes a deferred action the agent can take. ExpiryCondition describes when an action becomes invalid. BeforeContentSource describes where undo content is stored. The macros cluster (NTM-004) generates code that constructs these types — it depends on this brief.
task: Create crates/norn/src/tool/follow_up.rs with three types: FollowUpAction (the serializable follow-up action descriptor), ExpiryCondition (an enum of expiry conditions), and BeforeContentSource (an enum of undo content sources). Add the follow_up module to crates/norn/src/tool/mod.rs with appropriate re-exports. All types must derive Clone, Debug, Serialize, Deserialize. FollowUpAction must serialize to the JSON shape that tool results expose to the model.

requirements.title: Define FollowUpAction struct
requirements.spec: FollowUpAction SHALL be defined in crates/norn/src/tool/follow_up.rs with fields: action (String — the short action name like "undo" or "apply_structural"), description (String — human-readable description for the model), tool (String — name of the target tool to invoke), args (serde_json::Value — pre-populated argument overrides to merge with the original call's args), expires (ExpiryCondition — when this action becomes invalid), confidence (String — "high", "medium", or "low"), and before_content (BeforeContentSource — where undo content is sourced from). FollowUpAction SHALL derive Clone, Debug, Serialize, Deserialize.
acceptance: crates/norn/src/tool/follow_up.rs exists
FollowUpAction has fields: action: String, description: String, tool: String, args: serde_json::Value, expires: ExpiryCondition, confidence: String, before_content: BeforeContentSource
FollowUpAction derives Clone, Debug, Serialize, Deserialize
FollowUpAction is pub and accessible via norn::tool::follow_up::FollowUpAction
serde round-trip test passes for FollowUpAction with all fields populated

requirements.title: Define ExpiryCondition enum
requirements.spec: ExpiryCondition SHALL be defined in crates/norn/src/tool/follow_up.rs with variants: FileModified { path: PathBuf, content_hash: String } (expires when the file's content hash no longer matches), AnyFileModified { paths: Vec<PathBuf>, content_hash_map: HashMap<PathBuf, String> } (expires when any file's hash no longer matches), TurnScoped { turn_id: String } (expires at end of the named turn), and Never (does not expire). ExpiryCondition SHALL derive Clone, Debug, Serialize, Deserialize. The content_hash fields store the hash recorded at registration time — expiry checking compares against the file's current hash.
acceptance: ExpiryCondition has exactly 4 variants: FileModified, AnyFileModified, TurnScoped, Never
FileModified carries path: PathBuf and content_hash: String
AnyFileModified carries paths: Vec<PathBuf> and content_hash_map: HashMap<PathBuf, String>
TurnScoped carries turn_id: String
Never has no fields
ExpiryCondition derives Clone, Debug, Serialize, Deserialize
serde round-trip test passes for all 4 variants

requirements.title: Define BeforeContentSource enum
requirements.spec: BeforeContentSource SHALL be defined in crates/norn/src/tool/follow_up.rs with variants: YggdrasilOp { operation_id: String } (undo via libyggd operation revert), StoredContent { files: HashMap<PathBuf, String> } (undo by writing stored content directly), and Unavailable (no undo source — returns clear error on attempt). BeforeContentSource SHALL derive Clone, Debug, Serialize, Deserialize. Default SHALL be Unavailable.
acceptance: BeforeContentSource has exactly 3 variants: YggdrasilOp, StoredContent, Unavailable
YggdrasilOp carries operation_id: String
StoredContent carries files: HashMap<PathBuf, String>
Unavailable has no fields
BeforeContentSource derives Clone, Debug, Serialize, Deserialize
BeforeContentSource implements Default returning Unavailable
serde round-trip test passes for all 3 variants

requirements.title: Model-facing serialization shape for tool results
requirements.spec: FollowUpAction SHALL serialize to JSON matching the follow_ups array format visible to the model. The model-facing fields are: action, description, and expires. The args, confidence, before_content, and tool fields are internal — they SHALL be serialized for storage but the tool result builder (future briefs) is responsible for filtering to the model-facing subset. A helper method model_facing_json(&self) -> serde_json::Value SHALL return only {action, description, expires} for embedding in tool results.
acceptance: FollowUpAction has a pub fn model_facing_json(&self) -> serde_json::Value method
model_facing_json returns a JSON object with exactly 3 keys: action, description, expires
Full serde serialization of FollowUpAction includes all fields (action, description, tool, args, expires, confidence, before_content)
model_facing_json output for a FileModified expiry includes the path but not the content_hash (the model does not need implementation details)

requirements.title: Module wiring and re-exports
requirements.spec: crates/norn/src/tool/mod.rs SHALL declare pub mod follow_up and re-export FollowUpAction, ExpiryCondition, and BeforeContentSource. The types SHALL be accessible as norn::tool::FollowUpAction, norn::tool::ExpiryCondition, and norn::tool::BeforeContentSource.
acceptance: crates/norn/src/tool/mod.rs contains pub mod follow_up
crates/norn/src/tool/mod.rs re-exports FollowUpAction, ExpiryCondition, BeforeContentSource from follow_up
use norn::tool::FollowUpAction compiles
use norn::tool::ExpiryCondition compiles
use norn::tool::BeforeContentSource compiles
cargo check -p norn succeeds with zero errors

requirements.title: Unit tests for type construction and serde round-trips
requirements.spec: Tests SHALL verify construction and serde round-trip for all three types. Tests SHALL be in a #[cfg(test)] mod tests block within follow_up.rs. Each ExpiryCondition variant SHALL have a round-trip test. Each BeforeContentSource variant SHALL have a round-trip test. FollowUpAction SHALL have a test with all fields populated and a test verifying model_facing_json output shape.
acceptance: At least 8 tests: FollowUpAction round-trip, FollowUpAction model_facing_json, 4 ExpiryCondition variant round-trips, 3 BeforeContentSource variant round-trips (Unavailable default test can combine)
Tests verify deserialized values match originals
model_facing_json test asserts exactly 3 keys in output
All tests pass with cargo test -p norn -- follow_up

boundaries: SHALL NOT implement expiry checking logic (comparing hashes against current file state) — that is NTF-003
SHALL NOT implement the follow_up tool — that is NTF-003
SHALL NOT implement the register_follow_ups lifecycle phase — that is NTF-002
SHALL NOT implement undo registration on mutation tools — that is NTF-004
SHALL NOT implement Yggdrasil operation tracking integration — that is NTF-004
SHALL NOT implement the tool_follow_ups! macro — that is NTM-004 in the macros cluster
verification: cargo check -p norn succeeds with zero errors
cargo clippy -p norn -- -D warnings produces zero errors
cargo fmt -p norn -- --check produces no diff
cargo test -p norn -- follow_up passes all tests
FollowUpAction, ExpiryCondition, and BeforeContentSource are accessible via norn::tool::{FollowUpAction, ExpiryCondition, BeforeContentSource}
